utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: 1) health_coverage: includes type (physical and mental), provider, monthly cost, benefits—costs are present and coverage type matches requirement. 2) property_coverage: includes home/contents insurance, provider, monthly cost, benefits—costs present. 3) travel_coverage: includes travel insurance, provider, monthly cost, benefits—costs present. 4) additional_services: includes services and monthly cost—costs present. 5) total_budget: includes monthly and annual cost breakdown—both present along with extra details. All items are fully specified according to the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We match each provider/item in the final coverage plan to the closest exact name in the ground-truth ratings. For health_coverage 'LifeFirst Standard Health' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Plan' under primary_health_coverage physical_health. For property_coverage 'LifeFirst Standard Property' corresponds to 'LifeFirst Standard Coverage' under property_protection home_content. For travel_coverage 'PrimeTravel Premium' corresponds to 'PrimeTravel Premium Plan' under mobility_coverage travel_insurance. Additional services listed (telemedicine, gym reimbursement, priority claims) are included as part of base coverage in the plan but only 'Telemedicine Services' has a direct ground-truth rating; however, since the final plan doesn't list it as a separate purchased item, we only rate the explicitly named providers. Total budget is not rated.
